steps.title: Use the critics' praise
steps.content: The critics call the films "galvanizing" and "picture perfect." Those are strongly positive evaluations, so fans hope that this favorable critical response will attract new audiences to the two films.

steps.title: Rule out mismatched nouns
steps.content: A means mixed or uncertain feelings, which does not match the critics' clearly positive language. C means the ability to predict the future, and D means neutrality or lack of bias. None matches enthusiastic public praise or critical approval. The answer is B.
